feat.name: Devastating Duelist
feat.text:
You pointedly note your enemy's deficiencies, filling them with fear and dismay. Strike an opponent with your Aldori dueling sword.   
  
If the Strike is successful, attempt a Dueling Lore check against the target's Will DC. On a success, the target becomes frightened 2. This is an emotion, fear, and mental effect.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.
